## ZXTouch Rootless

System-wide touch simulation for **iOS 15–16**. Supports Dopamine (rootless) and Roothide/Serotonin.

### Features
- Touch simulation (up to 19 fingers)
- Python script automation
- Image matching (no OpenCV)
- OCR via Vision framework
- Color picker & searcher
- Text input & keyboard control
- iOS Shortcuts integration
- Dark mode

### Requirements
- iOS 15.0 – 16.6.1
- Dopamine or Roothide jailbreak
- Python 3 from Procursus (for scripts)

## v0.08
- Full roothide (Serotonin) support
- image_match working via Accelerate.framework
- iOS Shortcuts integration fixed
- insert_text / keyboard control working
- Python 3.9+ auto-detection & setup
- Restored log format with timestamps
- Touch indicator orientation fix
